runs.text: Smiles Davis, thanks for the support. We loved your review you wrote us so we thought we'd write back with a little gift.
Here's 500 bonus points for your account! That's 10% off you can spend whenever.

runs.text: You can use them now to get 15% off your next order or unlock 20% off with an additional 250 points.

blockMeta.name: Thanks for being part of the…

runs.text: Thanks for being part of the ride. We couldn't do it without you.

runs.text:
Roses are red,
Water is clear,
Stay hydrated, my love,
And feel full of cheer!
Sip on the good stuff,
Refreshing and true,
Hydration's the key—
From us, just for you!
You're earning points on every order for discounts & special treats! You've got 750 points—let's keep a good thing going.
